productDisplayName: Fila Men Trasform White Casual Shoes
description: Perfect for those who love to play on the court, the fila Transform is designed for absolute grip and traction on indoor floors and fields.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays and perforated on the toe region and side midfoot for absolute breathable comfortPadded and meshed tongue and padded collar for snug, customised comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsoleTPR outsole for absolute durabilityHrringbone pattern lugs throughout the outsole with pivot points on the big toe mound and along the lateral forefoot and mid backfoot for easy sideways movement of the footshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
